name: claudevisual
description: Real-time visibility and config tuning for Claude Code sessions inside VS Code

claudevisual.debug.description: Log verbose ClaudeVisual diagnostics to the ClaudeVisual output channel.

enumDescriptions: Max subscription — the USD figure is an API-equivalent consumption proxy, not billed money.
Pro subscription — same flat-fee framing as Max.
API/pay-as-you-go — the USD figure is real billed spend.
claudevisual.advisor.plan.markdownDescription: Your Claude Code billing plan. On a flat-fee subscription (Max/Pro) the Efficiency Advisor frames cost as a usage-budget consumption proxy rather than out-of-pocket money.

claudevisual.advisor.notifyCritical.description: Show a VS Code notification when a session hits a critical efficiency condition (e.g. context almost full). Fires once per condition, not per update.

claudevisual.advisor.thresholds.contextW.description: Context-window occupancy (%) at which the Efficiency Advisor starts warning that context is filling up.

claudevisual.advisor.thresholds.contextC.description: Context-window occupancy (%) at which the Efficiency Advisor flags context as critical (wrap up or /compact now). Must be greater than contextWarnPercent.

claudevisual.advisor.thresholds.cacheChu.description: Cache creation:read ratio above which the advisor flags high cache churn (context being re-written instead of reused).
Minimum cache-creation tokens before the cache-churn check applies, so small early sessions (naturally high ratio before reuse accrues) don't false-trip.

claudevisual.advisor.thresholds.cacheLow.description: Cache-reuse rate (%) below which the advisor nudges about low cache reuse on a session with real spend.
Minimum total tokens before the low-cache-reuse nudge applies.

claudevisual.advisor.thresholds.subagent.description: Token spend by a single sub-agent above which the advisor flags it for ROI review.

claudevisual.advisor.thresholds.modelRig.description: Minimum total tokens on an Opus session before the advisor considers suggesting a lighter model.
Maximum output-token share (0-1) on an Opus session for the advisor to suggest a lighter model — low output share means little of the reasoning premium was used.

claudevisual.advisor.thresholds.costProj.description: Minimum live token burn rate (tokens/min) before the advisor projects time-to-context-limit.

claudevisual.advisor.thresholds.frequent.description: Number of /compact events in a session at which the advisor flags repeated compaction and suggests splitting the work into a fresh session.

scripts.compile:production: npm run clean && tsc --noEmit -p . && node esbuild.js --production
